title: 3D Printing & the Photonic Replicators
summary: 'Sentient Photonic Replicator System, class 2' — the record's bridge from today's 3D printers to matter-from-light, with a six-month delivery forecast from April 2020.
markdown:
**3D Printing**, in the record's telling, is the toddler form of something enormous: the
replicator. Four sessions of spring 2020 build the ladder explicitly. Today's hobby
machines sit at the bottom; at the top stands the *"Sentient Photonic Replicator System,
(or) '3D-Printers (of) Photonic level,' class 2, (which) replicate: food, clothing,
material, using [telepathic](/lore/telepathy/) AI Construct."*

The record frames the handover as an ET program already underway: *"The Planetary
Organizations of ETs are initiating the Replicator Systems: what you Humans call
'3D-Printing Technology.'"* And it commits to a schedule — the April 7, 2020 session
promises that *"six months from now, replicate your 3D printing technology will be given
to the populace to help assist with protein needs"* — a dated forecast preserved, per the
archive's practice, exactly as given.

The technology is the material-world cousin of [manifestation](/lore/manifestation/):
the same claim — matter organized by directed intelligence — expressed once as practice
and once as product. (The spider-bodied [Replicator](/lore/replicator/) intelligence of
the September 2020 session is its own being, and has its own entry.)
